name: ecommerce_pipeline
comment: End-to-end e-commerce data pipeline: Bronze -> Silver -> Gold

_exam_notes.development_mode: development=true allows iterative development without affecting production. Exam may ask about dev vs prod mode.
_exam_notes.continuous_vs_triggered: continuous=false means triggered mode (run once). continuous=true keeps the pipeline running.
_exam_notes.edition: ADVANCED edition supports expectations. CORE edition does not.
_exam_notes.target: The target database/schema where DLT tables are created.
